summary: Iteration 29 - Testing Bible 'Salvati' button and mood-checkin API. Backend 12/12 tests passed - mood-checkin API returns different verses on consecutive calls (verified). CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG: 'Salvati' button in Bible reading toolbar is NOT visible in the UI, despite code existing at line 698-705 in bible.tsx. Only 3 buttons render (Edizioni, A16, Aiuto) instead of 4.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: 'Salvati' button (myContent) is NOT rendering in the toolbar. Code exists at lines 698-705 in bible.tsx but only 3 buttons display: Edizioni, A16, Aiuto. The Salvati button should be the first button (with bookmark icon) linking to /my-content.
ui_bugs.expected: 4 toolbar buttons: Salvati, Edizioni, A16, Aiuto

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix 'Salvati' button not rendering in Bible reading toolbar - the TouchableOpacity at lines 698-705 in bible.tsx is not being displayed despite code being present
Check why the first button in readingToolbar View is not rendering - possible rendering order issue or conditional logic
Verify Icon component 'bookmark' is available and renders correctly
Consider using testID instead of data-testid for React Native compatibility
critical_code_review_comments: The TouchableOpacity for 'Salvati' button exists in code but doesn't render in UI - possible JSX/rendering issue
Translation key 'myContent' exists in all 6 languages but button still not visible
Three other toolbar buttons render correctly, suggesting issue is specific to the first button
seed_data_creation: Test created and deleted a bookmark for Salmi 23:1 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend mood-checkin API working correctly - returns different verses on consecutive calls (verified with 5 consecutive calls for same mood). Critical frontend issue: 'Salvati' button not rendering in Bible reading toolbar. Code exists but button is invisible. Main agent needs to investigate why the first TouchableOpacity in readingToolbar doesn't render.

mood_checkin_api.notes: 5 consecutive calls with same mood return different verses - random.choice() working correctly

mood_checkin_multilingual.notes: Tested Italian, English, Spanish - all return correct language verses

bible_toolbar_salvati_button.issue: Button not rendering despite code existing - CRITICAL BUG

rca_of_issue: The 'Salvati' button is defined in bible.tsx at lines 698-705 as the first child of the readingToolbar View. However, in the browser UI only 3 buttons render (Edizioni, A16, Aiuto). The code structure appears correct but the button is simply not displaying. Possible causes: 1) JSX rendering issue, 2) Icon component issue with 'bookmark' name, 3) CSS/style issue hiding the element. The other 3 buttons in the same container render correctly.
